# Base64 Encoder/Decoder Pro

> A free, open-source online tool for encoding and decoding Base64 data. No registration required. All processing happens in your browser.

## What We Do

Base64 Encoder/Decoder Pro is a comprehensive utility for working with Base64 encoding — the binary-to-text encoding standard used across the web. Whether you're encoding files for email transmission, working with data-URIs, inspecting JWT tokens, or processing SAML assertions, this tool provides instant, browser-based conversion with no server uploads.

The tool supports standard Base64 encoding, URL-safe Base64 (RFC 4648), file uploads, bulk processing of multiple lines, JWT token inspection, and image-to-data-URI conversion.

## Key Features

- **Encode & Decode**: Instant conversion between plain text and Base64
- **File Upload**: Upload binary files and encode them to Base64
- **JWT Decoder**: Inspect and parse JWT authentication tokens
- **Data-URI Converter**: Convert images to Base64 data-URIs for CSS/HTML embedding
- **URL-Safe Mode**: Encode using RFC 4648 URL-safe Base64 (- and _ instead of + and /)
- **Bulk Processor**: Encode or decode multiple lines simultaneously
- **History**: Track your recent encoding/decoding operations
- **Dark Mode**: Full light/dark theme support
- **Privacy**: All processing happens locally in your browser — no server uploads

## Core Topics Covered

- What is Base64 encoding
- How to encode text and files to Base64
- How to decode Base64 back to plain text
- JWT token inspection and validation
- Image-to-data-URI conversion
- URL-safe Base64 encoding (RFC 4648)
- Common uses of Base64 in web development
- Base64 size overhead (33% increase)
- Difference between Base64 encoding and encryption
- Bulk processing and batch conversion

## Use Cases

- Email: Encoding binary attachments for transmission
- Web Development: Creating data-URIs for CSS background images
- APIs: Working with Base64-encoded tokens and credentials
- Security: Inspecting JWT, OAuth, and SAML tokens
- Data Exchange: Encoding binary data for text-only communication channels
- Bulk Operations: Processing multiple Base64 strings in batch

## Technology

Built with vanilla JavaScript — no frameworks, no dependencies, no build step. The tool works completely offline once loaded. WCAG AA accessible. Fully responsive mobile design.

---

**Updated:** 2026-07-05  
**Hosting:** https://base64-encoder.pro/
